message:
refactor(robot,tmux,context,tui): extract pane-title session parser and expand attention feed and test coverage

robot/attention_feed.go: replace inline pane-title session extraction
  (SplitN on "__") with tmux.PaneTitleSession() which correctly handles
  titles containing multiple "__" separators by splitting on the last
  occurrence; add test for multi-separator titles

robot/patterns.go, patterns_test.go: expanded pattern matching for
  additional agent type variants

robot/robot.go, assignment_test.go: additional robot fields and test
  coverage

tmux/session.go, session_test.go, extra_test.go: add PaneTitleSession()
  helper extracting session name from pane titles; expanded tmux session
  tests

context/rotation.go, rotation_test.go: expanded rotation strategy tests

tui/dashboard/: minor dashboard rendering and layout test improvements

beads: sync issue tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
